name: Pi-SEO: Medium priority scan — 02:00 UTC daily
Pi-SEO: Low priority scan — 03:00 UTC daily
Self-improvement: lesson pattern analyser — Sunday 16:00 UTC (02:00 AEST)
Board: quality review — daily 05:00 UTC
note: Daily board sync — reviews in-flight PRs, evaluator scores, flagged risks

name: Risk Register R-02: Quarterly ANTHROPIC_API_KEY fallback dry-run — 1st Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct 17:00 UTC
note: RA-634 — tests direct Anthropic SDK path (TAO_USE_FALLBACK contingency). See DEPLOYMENT.md → Contingency: API Fallback.

name: Outcome Feedback Loop: analyzing-customer-patterns — 1st of month 08:00 UTC
note: RA-689 — reads shipped-features.jsonl, detects outcome signals from Linear, writes outcome lessons, flags stale features, returns BVI contribution data.

name: ZTE v2 Section C scorer — daily 03:00 UTC
Anthropic Intel: refresh docs — daily 02:00 UTC
note: Feeds fresh Anthropic docs + release notes into planner/orchestrator context

note: RA-684 — external tooling discovery, scores against ZTE, creates scout-tagged Linear tickets

name: Scout: afternoon intel refresh — daily 16:30 UTC
note: Second daily sweep — catches west-coast / overnight releases

name: Plan Discovery: research brief for today's backlog — daily 03:00 UTC
note: Perplexity + web search for every Urgent/High ticket; output feeds planner context

name: Feedback Loop: what worked / what failed — daily noon UTC
note: Analyses last 24h session outcomes; surfaces patterns to evaluator + board

name: Meta-Curator: weekly lessons clustering — Sunday 02:00 UTC
note: RA-1839 — clusters .harness/lessons.jsonl rows by (category, repo) and proposes new SKILL.md drafts via skill-creator SDK. HITL-gated through draft_review.

name: Meta-Curator: daily PR-diff scan — 03:00 UTC
note: RA-1839 — clusters merged PRs touching the same file path and proposes skills from recurrence patterns. HITL-gated.

name: Pi-CEO Weekly Recap — Thu 22:00 UTC = Fri 08:00 AEST — RA-2006
note: RA-2006 — fires Thu 22:00 UTC = Fri 08:00 AEST. Cron uses datetime.utcnow().weekday(), so weekday=3 (Thursday UTC) is correct here even though the operator-facing day is Friday. Reuses portfolio_pulse with lookback_window(168h) + Telegram delivery enabled. Founder request 2026-05-05.

name: Discovery loop — RestoreAssist (RA-2026 Phase 1 proof)
note: RA-2026 Phase 1 proof-of-pattern. Disabled by default — flip enabled=true after 48h dry-run review of ~/.hermes/discovery/restoreassist/*.jsonl reports. The persona's `scan_schedule` in projects.json is `0 */6 * * *` (every 6h), but cron-triggers.json supports single hour:minute fields, so we fire once per day at 00:00 UTC for the proof; the 6/12/18 window staggering lands in the Wave 2 sub-issue once Phase 1 is signed off. Discovery loop is gated on TAO_SWARM_ENABLED=1 + per-project discovery_enabled=true in projects.json.

name: Discovery loop — archive stale sev 4-5 tickets >7d (RA-2027)
note: RA-2027 — daily 02:00 UTC sweep. Operator decision 2026-05-06: tickets with `discovery-loop` label at priority 3-4 (sev 4-5) with `updatedAt` >7 days ago auto-close to Cancelled with explanatory comment. Priority 1-2 (sev>=6) NEVER auto-closes. Prerequisite for Discovery going live across all 7 personas (~196 findings/day would exhaust Linear quotas without this).

name: KPI watchdog daily (RA-3007)
note: RA-3007 — Daily 09:00 UTC scan of guardian + cs + cfo + cto state. Posts Telegram only on breach. See scripts/kpi_watchdog.py.

name: Capability Intelligence Loop — daily 05:30 UTC
note: Runs external AI capability scout, writes Obsidian/2nd-brain artifacts, validates CRM intake. CRM posting remains opt-in via UNITE_CRM_CAPABILITY_POST=1.

name: Marketing skill bridge — daily 20:30 UTC (UNI-2236)
note: Pipes marketing-skill output into social_posts with eeat/geo scoring for publisher crons.
